mcp:tool-listener.name: get-b2b-partner-certificates
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Get the list of all B2B partner certificates along with their serial number, expiry date, secret type, partner name, partner email and the partner profile URL link in Anypoint Partner Manager.

logger.doc:name: Partner Manager API response
logger.message: Partner Manager API response: operation=get-certificates, status=#[attributes.statusCode]

mcp:tool-listener.name: upload-b2b-partner-certificate
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Upload a public certificate or identity key for a B2B partner in Anypoint Partner Manager. Returns the certificate UUID (certificateId) for use as partnerCertificateId when calling create-b2b-endpoints for an AS2 Send endpoint. Provide partner name (must already exist; must exactly match the name in Partner Manager, e.g. "Sunny Farms" not "Sunny Farmss"), certificate name, type (PUBLIC or IDENTITY_KEY), and PEM content.

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (payload.partnerName is Array) payload.partnerName[0] else payload.partnerName

logger.doc:name: Partner Manager API response
logger.message: Partner Manager API response: operation=create-certificate, status=#[attributes.statusCode], certificateId=#[payload.id]

logger.doc:name: Partner Manager cert API error
logger.message: Partner Manager certificate API error response: status=#[error.attributes.statusCode default 'N/A'], body=#[payload], errorPayload=#[error.payload]

set-variable.value: #[if (payload is String) payload else if (payload is Object) write(payload, 'application/json') else (error.payload as String default '')]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { certificateId: null, error: "Certificate upload failed: " ++ vars.apiErrorMessage ++ ". Check partner name, PEM content, and API docs.", apiResponse: vars.apiErrorBody default null }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- if (payload.error != null) payload else { certificateId: payload.id, partnerId: vars.partnerId, partnerName: vars.requestPartnerName, partnerPageUrl: "https://anypoint.mulesoft.com/partnermanager/#/organizations/" ++ p('anypoint.apm.orgid') ++ '/environments/' ++ p('anypoint.apm.envid') ++ '/partners/' ++ vars.partnerId, certificateName: payload.name default null, expires: payload.expires default null }
%dw 2.0 output text/plain --- "Partner not found: " ++ vars.requestPartnerName ++ ". Create the partner first with create-b2b-partner-profile or check the name."
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { certificateId: null, error: "Certificate upload failed: " ++ vars.flowErrorMessage }

mcp:tool-listener.name: get-b2b-partner-profiles
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Get the list of all B2B partner profiles along with their name, identifiers and contact information

logger.message: Retrieving Anypoint Partner Manager Partner Profiles

logger.doc:name: Partner Manager API response
logger.message: Partner Manager API response: operation=get-partnerprofiles, status=#[attributes.statusCode]

mcp:tool-listener.name: create-b2b-partner-profile
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Create a new B2B partner profile in Anypoint Partner Manager, with name, identifiers, and Contact information. The response includes the newly created partner's id and an URL that the user can directly click to open the partner profile page in Anypoint Partner Manager. When referencing this partner later (e.g. upload certificate), use the exact same partner name.

logger.message: Payload being sent to APM Partners API: #[payload]

logger.doc:name: Partner Manager API response
logger.message: Partner Manager API response: operation=create-partner, status=#[attributes.statusCode], partnerId=#[payload.id]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "partnerId": payload.id, "partnerPageUrl": "https://anypoint.mulesoft.com/partnermanager/#/organizations/" ++ p('anypoint.apm.orgid') ++ '/environments/' ++ p('anypoint.apm.envid') ++ '/partners/' ++ payload.id }

mcp:tool-listener.name: create-b2b-endpoints
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Create new endpoints in Partner Manager for protocols such as SFTP, FTP, HTTP, HTTPS and AS2.

raise-error.description: #["The protocol '" ++ (payload.protocol default "unknown") ++ "' with direction '" ++ (payload.direction default "unknown") ++ "' is not currently supported by this onboarding tool."]

logger.doc:name: Partner Manager API response
logger.message: Partner Manager API response: operation=create-endpoint, status=#[attributes.statusCode], id=#[payload.id default 'N/A']

logger.doc:name: Partner Manager endpoint API error
logger.message: Partner Manager endpoint API error response: status=#[error.attributes.statusCode default 'N/A'], body=#[payload], errorPayload=#[error.payload]

set-variable.value: #[if (payload is String) payload else if (payload is Object) write(payload, 'application/json') else (error.payload as String default '')]

#[output application/java --- {'error': 'Endpoint creation failed: ' ++ (vars.apiErrorMessage default 'Unknown error') ++ '. Check partner name, endpoint payload, and API docs.', 'apiResponse': vars.apiErrorBody default null}]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "Endpoint creation failed: " ++ (vars.apiErrorMessage default "Unknown error") ++ ". Check partner name, endpoint payload, and API docs.", apiResponse: vars.apiErrorBody default null }
